summary: Reworked only M0-002 against the authoritative verifier report: production validators now observe RSS/deadlines, build facts come from declared Bazel status/settings, performance and corpus cross-document relationships reconcile exact bytes and derived values, schema/DAG limits are literal and pre-parse where schema-specific, fuzz runs with ASan+UBSan plus fail-closed simulations, and coverage rejects stale reports. The full registered suite is green in run-20260722T171208Z, the blocker-to-fix audit is retained in handoff-r1.md, and M0-002 is IMPLEMENTED for independent re-verification.
